idempotency_key.description: Optional ULID. If absent, the server generates one and forwards it as `Idempotency-Key:` to `POST /v1/prompt-runs`. Window: 24h (see OQ-MCP-3, default-if-undecided).

project.description: Required per AD-Phase3-MCP-ProjectScoping. Single-project servers default-resolve to the configured project name or the literal "default".

providers.description: Optional — defaults to the project's configured provider set.
